titleStmt.title: SII 34.265: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 265. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: This records the sale of their land by two groups of brothers to the Tiruvaraṅguḷam temple. The sellers undertook to pay themselves all the tax dues on the sold land and also take responsibility for any future disputes on that land. It is said that the land comprised wet land, dry land, and the fields with tamarind and mango trees.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiyatEvaṟku yāṇṭu 9vatu rājavaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkuḷamuṭai
yār Āticaṇṭēśvaradevaṟku Iṉāṭṭu kuṭi kuḷavaṉ koṟṟaṉum tampimārum namaṉ ciṟai Eṉavalla mutta
raiyaṉun tampimārum Ivvaṉaivōmum Iṉāyaṉār tirumalaiyil kalveṭṭik kuṭutta nīr nilaṅkaḷum puṉcey puḷi
kkaḷum māvumaraṅkaḷum viṟpataṟkicaintu perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai Innāyanār tēvatānam Iraṅkuḷattil
kiḻakkaṭaiyil peruṅkaḷur kālvākku kiḻakkum Ikkuḷattukku mēṟkku kaṭaiyil Akaḻkarai perukiya paḻaṅkaray
Iṟaiṅkuḷattil mēṟkaṭaikkum Ivayal vēlaikkum Ācāriyaṉ vayallukkum kuḷattu Ellaikku ṉṟa kuḷattu
mēṟkaṭaikku mēvayal Ellaikkum puṉce Ellaikkum tirukkākkai Ellaikkum kuṟuvaiyal Ellaikkum mēṟkkum teṉpāṟke
llai Inṉāyaṉār tēvatāṉam teṉkavināṭṭu kuḷattu Uḷ vayal nāṅkaḷ taṭi pāṟtu viṭṭa nilattukkum nāyaṉārkku paḻantēva
tāṉamāyi varukiṟa puṉce Ellaikku Ināyaṉā tēvatāṉa pāṇṭi muttaraiyantal Ellaikkum vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkku Ellai
kuṟucci nāṭṭelaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟku Ellai periyanattu vaṭavēlikku mēṟkku mēlvēlikku kiḻakkum Iṟai
kuḷattukkaṭai cella teṟkku Āka Icainta perunānkellai Uṭpaṭa nīr(nīr) nilamum puṉcekaḷum kaliṅkataraiyaṉukku
tenkarai nāṭāḻvaṉ viṟṟa vilaippaṭi Ivan puṉceyu vallapan piḷḷi tenkarai naṭāvāḻn tuṭavai nīkki Eṭaiya marutaṉukkum
mēṟkku � Oru puṉce nīkki ninṟa nīkki Uḷḷa nilaṅkaḷil puḷikaḷum māmaraṅkaḷum Em Icaiṉta vilaipporuḷukku patināiramum
koṇṭu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷḷaṟa koṇṭu kallu veṭṭi kuṭuttōm Iṉ nilaṅkaḷillu puncekāy Eṅkaḷukku Uṇṭeṉṟu
vaṉtavakaḷukku nilattu nilam puṟampōntanitilē Ivarkaḷukku Icaiya viṭa kaṭavōmākavum Ippaṭi Icaintu kallu ve
ṭṭi kuṭuttōm Innāṉku Ellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nīr nilam puṉcaikaḷum vanta Iṟai kuṭimai Eppēṟpa
paṭṭaṉavum nāṅkaḷē Iṟuppōmākavum Ippaṭi cammaticcu kalveṭṭik kuṭuttōm
caṇṭēcura tēvaṟku muṉ collappaṭṭa Aṉaivarōm Ippaṭikku Araṉkuḻavaṉ koṟṟaṉ
Eḻuttu ciṟaiyaṉavalla muttaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Iṉ nāṭṭu kaṇakku vallanāṭṭu vēḷā
ṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
